title: Level Design Workshop: Designing Celeste
creator: Maddy Thorson
description: Maddy Thorson works through Celeste’s level-design process, including movement verbs, room construction, teaching order, difficulty, iteration, and the relationship between individual screens and the larger chapter.
useful: A detailed first-party explanation of how a demanding game teaches through carefully ordered spatial problems.
audience: Level designers and developers tuning challenge, teaching, and iteration in movement games.
learning: Build rooms around a small set of movement verbs
Sequence challenges to teach without explicit instruction
Use playtesting to tune difficulty and flow
